help.title: Help Center
help.faqAddFriend: How do I add a friend?
help.faqAddFriendAnswer: Go to Contacts, tap "Add Friend", search by username or nickname, then tap "Add" to send a request. You can start chatting once they accept.
help.faqCreateGroup: How do I create a group?
help.faqCreateGroupAnswer: Go to Contacts, tap "Create Group", enter a name, select friends, and tap "Create".
help.faqReport: How do I report inappropriate content?
help.faqReportAnswer: Long-press a message to select "Report", or tap "Report" on a user's profile. Choose a reason and submit.
help.faqBlock: How do I block a user?
help.faqBlockAnswer: Tap "Block" on a user's profile. Blocked users cannot message each other. Manage blocked users in Settings > Blocked Users.
help.faqDeleteAccount: How do I delete my account?
help.faqDeleteAccountAnswer: Go to Settings > Account > Delete Account. After submitting, there is a 7-day cooling period. After that, your account and data will be permanently deleted.

about.title: About
about.description: {{appName}} is a secure, reliable instant messaging app designed to provide a simple and efficient communication experience.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1Body: {{appNameZh}} ({{appNameEn}}) is an instant messaging application that provides text chat, image sharing, voice and video calling features.
terms.s2Body: You must register an account using a valid email address. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and may not transfer it to others.
terms.s3Body: When using this service, you agree not to:
terms.s3i2: Post pornographic, violent, or otherwise illegal content
terms.s3i3: Impersonate others or engage in fraud
terms.s3i5: Use the service for any illegal activities
terms.s4Body: We reserve the right to take action against content that violates community guidelines, including but not limited to removing content, restricting accounts, or terminating service.
terms.s5Body: You may report violating users and messages, and block users you do not wish to contact. We will review and handle reports accordingly.
terms.s6Body: You may request account deletion at any time in Settings. After submission, there is a 7-day cooling period, after which your account and related data will be permanently deleted.
terms.s7Body: This service is provided "as is". We make no guarantees regarding continuous availability. We are not liable for any direct or indirect losses arising from the use of this service.
terms.s8Body: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Modified terms take effect upon publication. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.
terms.s9Body: If you have any questions, please contact: {{email}}

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.s1Body: {{appNameZh}} ({{appNameEn}}) collects the following types of information:
privacyPage.s1i1: Account information: email and username provided during registration
privacyPage.s1i2: Profile information: nickname, avatar, and bio you choose to provide
privacyPage.s1i3: Communication data: messages sent and received
privacyPage.s1i4: Device information: device type, operating system version
privacyPage.s2Body: We use the collected information for:
privacyPage.s2i1: Providing and maintaining the messaging service
privacyPage.s2i3: Improving service quality and user experience
privacyPage.s2i4: Handling reports and maintaining community safety
privacyPage.s3Body: Your data is stored on secure cloud servers with industry-standard encryption and security measures. We regularly review and update our security measures.
privacyPage.s4Body: We do not sell your personal information. We may share information only in the following situations:
privacyPage.s4i3: To protect user safety or public interest
privacyPage.s5i1: View and modify your personal profile
privacyPage.s5i2: Delete your account and related data
privacyPage.s5i3: Control privacy settings (online status, read receipts, etc.)
privacyPage.s6Body: We use row-level security (RLS) policies to ensure data isolation. Messages can only be accessed by conversation members, and personal settings are isolated by user.
privacyPage.s7Body: This service is intended for users aged 13 and above. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.
privacyPage.s8Body: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Updated policies will be published within the app. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
